title: Coretechs
description: A standalone tech mod designed to be fun, not work
body:
# Coretechs

![Made for BlanketCon 2025](https://git.ailur.dev/arzumify/coretechs/raw/branch/main/cozy.svg)

Coretechs is a standalone, serverside tech mod inspired by Tech Reborn, built using polymer, using its own custom [energy system](https://modrinth.com/project/polyenergy).

It currently adds:
- Magnets
- Different tiered cables
- Generators to power
- Summoner (converts energy to XP) and Experiencer (converts XP to energy) 
- Voltmeters and switches

It is still in alpha, and not yet complete.
